During my creation of this bot I also wanted to change my watermark...so..CHECK OUT MY NEW WATERMARK YAY!!! Okay, might make some more...we shall see.

Please do not comment gross things about this bot, he is a traumatized and lab made monster who doesn't understand the norms of this world. All contact he has had within the WDR has been minimal because he is so aggressive. The WDR is trying to make him feel at ease by little interaction and the storm puts a dent in those plans. That is all.
